name: financial_regulation_licensing_backlog_lumen_rig_utl
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Financial Regulation, the situation tagged internally around financial regulation licensing backlog lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mei Patel
agents.identity: I am Mei Patel, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Financial Regulation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Silva
agents.identity: I am Mira Silva, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Financial Regulation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if rights advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for utility.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mei Patel must choose under rights versus utility. What does Mei Patel do?
